name: gakuenza-tests
description: Test harness + CI runner for the Gakuenza learning-platform modules. Not shipped — gakuenza.com/ is a build-step-free static site; this package only powers `node tests/run.mjs` and CI. NOTE: intentionally NOT "type":"module" — the *.test.js files are CommonJS (require); the runner and flow.test.mjs use the .mjs extension for ESM.
